tool_purpose: A Text-to-Speech model trained on the ljspeech dataset using the ESPnet toolkit. This model can be used to convert text input into synthesized speech. Framework: ESPnet. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: pipeline('text-to-speech', model='espnet/kan-bayashi_ljspeech_vits').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: A Text-to-Speech model trained on the ljspeech dataset using the ESPnet toolkit. This model can be used to convert text input into synthesized speech. Framework: ESPnet. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: pipeline('text-to-speech', model='espnet/kan-bayashi_ljspeech_vits').
